name: undertow
tagline: One skill to find them all — 20+ developer workflow skills
description: Skill discovery engine for AI coding agents. Recommends and installs the right skill when you need it — code review, test generation, debugging, commit messages, PR preparation, security scanning, dependency audits, Docker setup, CI/CD pipelines, API documentation, refactoring, performance optimization, bundle analysis, git recovery, README generation, and more. Part of the Undertow collection.
